fields.definition_en: If something is authentic, it is real, true, or what people say it is.
fields.example_en: The restaurant serves authentic Italian food.
fields.example_vi: Nhà hàng phục vụ món ăn Ý đích thực.
fields.mnemonic: Authentic authors write real stories.

fields.definition_en: To give official permission for something to happen, or to give someone official power to do something.
fields.example_en: Only the manager is authorized to sign these documents.
fields.example_vi: Chỉ có người quản lý mới được ủy quyền ký các tài liệu này.
fields.mnemonic: To give someone AUTHORITY is to authorize them.

fields.definition_en: A car (short for automobile).
fields.example_en: He works in the auto industry.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy làm việc trong ngành công nghiệp ô tô.
fields.mnemonic: Short for automobile.

fields.meaning_vi: sự tự trị, quyền tự trị
fields.definition_en: The right of an organization, country, or region to be independent and govern itself.
fields.example_en: The region has demanded greater autonomy from the central government.
fields.example_vi: Khu vực này đã yêu cầu quyền tự trị lớn hơn từ chính quyền trung ương.
fields.mnemonic: Auto (self) + nomy (law) -> making one's own laws.

fields.meaning_vi: sự có sẵn, tính khả dụng
fields.definition_en: The fact that something can be bought, used, or reached, or how much it can be.
fields.example_en: We will let you know about the availability of the tickets.
fields.example_vi: Chúng tôi sẽ cho bạn biết về sự có sẵn của vé.
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of available.

fields.definition_en: To wait for or be waiting for something.
fields.example_en: We are currently awaiting the results of the tests.
fields.example_vi: Chúng tôi hiện đang chờ kết quả xét nghiệm.
fields.mnemonic: A formal way to say 'wait'.

fields.definition_en: The general situation in which particular events happen.
fields.example_en: Their love story unfolded against a backdrop of war.
fields.example_vi: Câu chuyện tình yêu của họ diễn ra trong bối cảnh chiến tranh.
fields.mnemonic: The 'drop' at the 'back' of a stage sets the scene.

fields.meaning_vi: sự ủng hộ, sự hỗ trợ
fields.definition_en: Support, especially money, that someone gives to a person or plan.
fields.example_en: The project has the full backing of the government.
fields.example_vi: Dự án nhận được sự ủng hộ hoàn toàn của chính phủ.
fields.mnemonic: When someone has your back, they provide backing.

fields.meaning_vi: sự dự phòng, bản sao lưu
fields.definition_en: (Someone or something that provides) support or help, or something that you have arranged in case your main plans, equipment, etc. go wrong.
fields.example_en: Always make a backup of your important files.
fields.example_vi: Luôn tạo bản sao lưu cho các tệp quan trọng của bạn.
fields.mnemonic: To back up (verb) your data creates a backup (noun).

fields.definition_en: An amount of money that a person who has been accused of a crime pays to a law court so that they can be released until their trial.
fields.example_en: He was released on bail pending his trial.
fields.example_vi: Anh ta đã được tại ngoại hầu tra sau khi đóng tiền bảo lãnh.
fields.mnemonic: You pay BAIL to get OUT of JAIL.

fields.meaning_vi: lá phiếu, sự bỏ phiếu kín
fields.definition_en: A system or occasion of secret voting.
fields.example_en: The union held a secret ballot to decide whether to strike.
fields.example_vi: Công đoàn đã tổ chức bỏ phiếu kín để quyết định có đình công hay không.
fields.mnemonic: A small BALL was historically used to vOte -> BALLOT.

fields.definition_en: A long piece of cloth with words written on it, sometimes stretched between two poles and carried by people taking part in a march.
fields.example_en: The protesters carried a large banner demanding peace.
fields.example_vi: Những người biểu tình mang theo một băng rôn lớn đòi hòa bình.
fields.mnemonic: A BANNER is used to banish silence and proclaim a message.

fields.meaning_vi: trần truồng, trơ trọi, cơ bản
fields.definition_en: Without any clothes or not covered by anything; or only the most basic or important.
fields.example_en: Don't walk on the broken glass with bare feet.
fields.example_vi: Đừng đi chân trần trên mảnh kính vỡ.
fields.mnemonic: A bear without fur is bare.

fields.definition_en: A large container, made of wood, metal, or plastic, with a flat top and bottom and curved sides that make it fatter in the middle.
fields.example_en: They drank a whole barrel of beer.
fields.example_vi: Họ đã uống hết một thùng bia.
fields.mnemonic: Think of a wooden BARREL full of wine.

fields.definition_en: The lowest range of musical notes, or a singer or instrument producing such notes.
fields.example_en: He sings bass in the choir.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy hát giọng nam trầm trong dàn hợp xướng.
fields.mnemonic: Bass (music) is the BASE (bottom/low) sound.

fields.definition_en: To hit a ball with a bat; or to open and close your eyes quickly.
fields.example_en: He batted the ball out of the park.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy đánh quả bóng bay ra khỏi công viên.
fields.mnemonic: To use a BAT (noun) is to bat (verb).

fields.definition_en: A place where a battle is being fought or has been fought.
fields.example_en: Many soldiers lost their lives on the battlefield.
fields.example_vi: Nhiều binh sĩ đã mất mạng trên chiến trường.
fields.mnemonic: A FIELD where a BATTLE happens.

fields.definition_en: A part of the coast where the land curves in so that the sea is surrounded by land on three sides.
fields.example_en: The boat was anchored in the bay.
fields.example_vi: Con thuyền đang neo đậu trong vịnh.
fields.mnemonic: A bay is a curved body of water.

fields.meaning_vi: tia sáng, nụ cười rạng rỡ, thanh xà
fields.definition_en: A line of light; a wide, happy smile; a long, thick piece of wood, metal, or concrete used to support a roof.
fields.example_en: A laser beam was pointed at the stage.
fields.example_vi: Một tia laser được chiếu vào sân khấu.
fields.mnemonic: SunBEAMs stream down.

fields.definition_en: An animal, especially a large or wild one.
fields.example_en: The lion is a magnificent beast.
fields.example_vi: Sư tử là một con thú tuyệt đẹp.
fields.mnemonic: Beauty and the Beast.

fields.definition_en: Representing; in the place of.
fields.example_en: I am writing on behalf of my client.
fields.example_vi: Tôi đang viết thư thay mặt cho khách hàng của mình.
fields.mnemonic: On beHALF of someone (representing the other half).

fields.definition_en: Loved very much.
fields.example_en: He lost his beloved wife last year.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy đã mất người vợ yêu quý của mình vào năm ngoái.
fields.mnemonic: Someone who is BE LOVED is beloved.

fields.definition_en: A long, usually hard seat for two or more people, often found in public places.
fields.example_en: We sat on a park bench and ate our sandwiches.
fields.example_vi: Chúng tôi ngồi trên một băng ghế công viên và ăn bánh mì kẹp.
fields.mnemonic: A bench is a long seat.

fields.definition_en: A level of quality that can be used as a standard when comparing other things.
fields.example_en: Her performance set a new benchmark for the team.
fields.example_vi: Màn trình diễn của cô ấy đã thiết lập một tiêu chuẩn mới cho đội.
fields.mnemonic: A mark on a bench used as a standard for measuring.

fields.definition_en: In or to a lower position than someone or something, under someone or something.
fields.example_en: Jaime hid the letter beneath a pile of papers.
fields.example_vi: Jaime giấu bức thư dưới một đống giấy tờ.
fields.mnemonic: Beneath sounds a bit like 'be nether' (nether means lower).

fields.definition_en: A person or group who receives money, advantages, etc., as a result of something else.
fields.example_en: She was the main beneficiary of his will.
fields.example_vi: Cô là người thụ hưởng chính trong di chúc của ông.
fields.mnemonic: Someone who receives a BENEFIT.

fields.definition_en: To not be loyal to your country or a person, often by doing something harmful such as helping their enemies.
fields.example_en: He promised never to betray her trust.
fields.example_vi: Anh hứa sẽ không bao giờ phản bội lòng tin của cô.
fields.mnemonic: If you be a tray (tray=trash), you betray someone's trust.

fields.definition_en: To tie something or someone tightly, or to unite people.
fields.example_en: They bound his hands together with a rope.
fields.example_vi: Họ trói hai tay anh ta lại bằng một sợi dây.
fields.mnemonic: To put in a binder is to BIND pages together.

fields.definition_en: The life story of a person written by someone else.
fields.example_en: He wrote a fascinating biography of Winston Churchill.
fields.example_vi: Ông ấy đã viết một cuốn tiểu sử hấp dẫn về Winston Churchill.
fields.mnemonic: Bio (life) + graphy (writing) = writing about a life.

fields.definition_en: A priest of high rank who is in charge of the priests of lower rank in a particular area; or a piece in the game of chess.
fields.example_en: The bishop gave a sermon at the cathedral.
fields.example_vi: Giám mục đã thuyết pháp tại nhà thờ.
fields.mnemonic: A chess piece that moves diagonally.

fields.definition_en: Very strange and unusual.
fields.example_en: She wore a bizarre outfit to the party.
fields.example_vi: Cô ấy mặc một bộ trang phục kỳ quái đến bữa tiệc.
fields.mnemonic: A BIZARRE BAZAAR sells strange things.

fields.definition_en: The flat part on a knife or similar tool or weapon, with a very thin edge used for cutting.
fields.example_en: Be careful, the knife blade is very sharp.
fields.example_vi: Hãy cẩn thận, lưỡi dao rất sắc.
fields.mnemonic: A razor BLADE.

fields.definition_en: An explosion, or a sudden strong blow of air.
fields.example_en: The bomb blast destroyed several buildings.
fields.example_vi: Vụ nổ bom đã phá hủy một số tòa nhà.
fields.mnemonic: A BLAST of wind or an explosion.

fields.definition_en: To lose blood.
fields.example_en: Your nose is bleeding.
fields.example_vi: Mũi của bạn đang chảy máu.
fields.mnemonic: When you get cut, you bleed blood.

fields.definition_en: To mix or combine things together, or to mix so that they become one substance.
fields.example_en: Blend the ingredients until smooth.
fields.example_vi: Trộn đều các thành phần cho đến khi mịn.
fields.mnemonic: A BLENDer BLENDs things.

fields.definition_en: To ask for God's help and protection for someone or something, or to call or make someone or something holy.
fields.example_en: May God bless you and your family.
fields.example_vi: Cầu Chúa ban phước cho bạn và gia đình bạn.
fields.mnemonic: When someone sneezes, you say 'Bless you'.

fields.definition_en: A request by a priest for God to take care of a particular person or a group of people, or to make something holy; something that is extremely lucky or makes you happy.
fields.example_en: It was a blessing in disguise.
fields.example_vi: Đó là một phước lành ngụy trang (trong cái rủi có cái may).
fields.mnemonic: Noun form of bless.

fields.definition_en: To speak too proudly or happily about what you have done or what you own.
fields.example_en: He didn't talk about his exam results in case people thought he was boasting.
fields.example_vi: Anh ấy không nói về kết quả kỳ thi của mình phòng khi mọi người nghĩ anh ấy đang khoe khoang.
fields.mnemonic: To BOAST is to show off.

fields.definition_en: An extra amount of money that is given to you as a present or reward for good work as well as the money you were expecting.
fields.example_en: All employees received a Christmas bonus.
fields.example_vi: Tất cả nhân viên đều nhận được tiền thưởng Giáng sinh.
fields.mnemonic: An added bonus at work is extra money.

fields.definition_en: A period of sudden economic growth, especially one that results in a lot of money being made; or a deep, loud sound.
fields.example_en: The 1990s saw an economic boom.
fields.example_vi: Những năm 1990 chứng kiến một sự bùng nổ kinh tế.
fields.mnemonic: BOOM goes the economy! (Or the dynamite).

fields.definition_en: To (cause to) move up or away after hitting a surface.
fields.example_en: The children love to bounce on the bed.
fields.example_vi: Bọn trẻ thích nhảy tâng tâng trên giường.
fields.mnemonic: A bouncy ball bounces.

fields.definition_en: A real or imagined line that marks the edge or limit of something.
fields.example_en: The Ural mountains mark the boundary between Europe and Asia.
fields.example_vi: Dãy núi Ural đánh dấu ranh giới giữa Châu Âu và Châu Á.
fields.mnemonic: The bounds of an area form its boundary.

fields.definition_en: To bend your head or body forward, especially as a way of showing someone respect or expressing thanks to people who have watched you perform.
fields.example_en: They bowed to the Queen.
fields.example_vi: Họ cúi chào Nữ hoàng.
fields.mnemonic: Actors take a bow after a performance.

fields.meaning_vi: sự vi phạm, sự phá vỡ
fields.definition_en: An act of breaking a law, promise, agreement, or relationship.
fields.example_en: They sued the company for breach of contract.
fields.example_vi: Họ kiện công ty vì vi phạm hợp đồng.
fields.mnemonic: To breach is to BREAK a rule or a wall.

fields.definition_en: A failure to work or be successful.
fields.example_en: I had a breakdown on the motorway.
fields.example_vi: Xe tôi bị hỏng trên đường cao tốc.
fields.mnemonic: When a machine breaks down, you have a breakdown.

fields.definition_en: An important discovery or event that helps to improve a situation or provide an answer to a problem.
fields.example_en: Scientists have made a major breakthrough in the treatment of cancer.
fields.example_vi: Các nhà khoa học đã tạo ra một bước đột phá lớn trong việc điều trị bệnh ung thư.
fields.mnemonic: To BREAK THROUGH a barrier to make a discovery.

fields.definition_en: To keep animals for the purpose of producing young animals in a controlled way.
fields.example_en: His main income comes from breeding cattle.
fields.example_vi: Thu nhập chính của anh ấy đến từ việc nhân giống gia súc.
fields.mnemonic: Breeders breed animals.

fields.definition_en: A telecommunications system that allows information to be sent quickly between computers and other electronic equipment.
fields.example_en: Internet connection via broadband offers many advantages.
fields.example_vi: Kết nối Internet qua băng thông rộng mang lại nhiều lợi thế.
fields.mnemonic: A BROAD BAND of frequencies allows fast internet.

fields.definition_en: A computer program that makes it possible for you to read information on the internet.
fields.example_en: You need the latest version of the browser to view this site.
fields.example_vi: Bạn cần phiên bản mới nhất của trình duyệt để xem trang web này.
fields.mnemonic: You use it to BROWSE the internet.

fields.definition_en: Cruel, violent, and completely without feelings.
fields.example_en: He was the victim of a brutal attack.
fields.example_vi: Anh ta là nạn nhân của một cuộc tấn công tàn bạo.
fields.mnemonic: Brutus was brutal.
